name: Italian Sausage Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut Italian sausage into 2-inch lengths.
2. Brown the sausage in olive oil until mostly cooked; remove and set aside.
3. Make a roux with flour and the reserved oil.
4. Add onions, celery, and bell pepper; stir until tender or clear.
5. Incorporate water to achieve desired consistency.
6. Stir in white wine (adjust amount as needed), parsley, garlic, red cayenne pepper, Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce, dried mint, and tomato sauce.
7. Mix well and bring to a boil.
8. Add salt to taste and return the sausage to the pan.
9. Return to a boil.
10. Reduce heat and simmer for about 3-4 hours.
11. Serve over spaghetti topped with cheese.
